phases.name: Prototyping
phases.description: In this phase, seven repositories were created to develop and test individual components of the Nominate-AI project ecosystem. The focus was on building functional prototypes for various use cases, including data processing, messaging platforms, lead finding, email scanning, polling, web crawling, and header mapping.

milestones.title: Quantifi repository created
Meshnet and Weeds repositories created
Invoicehunter, Pollstar, Spydr, and Mapr repositories created
Mapr repository completed with 13 commits

phases.name: Alpha Development Phase
phases.description: During this phase, the core infrastructure and UI components of the Nominate-AI project ecosystem were developed. The development focused on setting up pipelines, creating a modern README.md, and implementing email integration with Gmail IMAP. The project also saw the creation of various tools and libraries for tasks such as URL encoding and batch processing.

milestones.title: Initial Commit: Refactor Pipeline Scripts and Service Setup
Update README with Comprehensive Documentation
Fix URL Encoding in Gmail IMAP Connection and Improve Error Handling

phases.name: Initial Project Setup
phases.description: The foundation for the Nominate-AI project was laid during this phase.

milestones.title: Lazarus Python Project
Seedbed Comprehensive Testing Infrastructure and Documentation
Clarion TypeScript Project
Campainbrain Unknown Project
Oym TypeScript Project
Cbtenant Python Project

phases.name: Refactoring and Initial Development
phases.description: The first weeks of Nominate-AI project ecosystem development focused on refactoring and initializing core components.

milestones.title: Initial commit for cbworkflow and cbapp
Initial commit for system
Initial commits for cbetl and cbai
['Initial commit for cbpublic', 'Initial commit for cbdistricts']

phases.name: Infrastructure Development
phases.description: A series of repositories were created to provide foundational components for the Nominate-AI project ecosystem, including infrastructure tools and core libraries.

milestones.title: Initial cbmodels repository created
Initial cbradio repository created
Initial cbinfra and cbsurveys repositories created
Initial cbfiles repository created with image and video processing features
Initial cbdocs shell repository created
Initial cbmesh Python repository created

phases.name: Development of Nominate-AI Project Ecosystem
phases.description: The development phase represented by these repositories focuses on building various components and tools for the Nominate-AI project ecosystem. This includes authentication, SMS gateway APIs, testing, and other foundational elements.

milestones.title: Initial cbos repository creation
Initial cbauth repository creation
Initial cbmaintain repository creation
Initial cbtest repository creation
Initial cbsms repository creation

phases.name: Phase 7
phases.description: Development of cbunstruct, cbtor, cbmobile and 4 more repos.

phases.name: Phase 8
phases.description: Development of cbgeo, cbmaps, cbcli and 4 more repos.

phases.name: System Development Phase
phases.description: The system development phase of the Nominate-AI project ecosystem saw the creation of seven repositories, each focusing on a distinct aspect of the campaign brain system. These repos included a webhooks ingestion service, an issue tracking dashboard, real-time monitoring dashboards, VPN cluster management APIs, online payment systems, and API access layers for social media accounts. This phase aimed to establish the foundation for the overall system.

milestones.title: Campaign Brain System Manager - Distributed monitoring and self-healing infrastructure
Webhook Ingestion Service
Issue Tracking Dashboard
Real-time System Health and Activity Monitoring Dashboard
VPN Cluster Management API - Geographic Routing through OpenWRT Workers
Online Payment System
API Access Layer for Social Media Accounts

phases.name: Phase 10
phases.description: Development of cbmcp, cbnetwork, cbexecutive and 4 more repos.

phases.name: Campaign Brain Development Phase
phases.description: This phase saw the creation of foundational components for the Nominate-AI project ecosystem, including UI and backend tools for CBRadio, router management, and template generation. The development phase also included the launch of ComfyUI's generative AI backend. This marked a significant milestone in the project's development.

milestones.title: Initial CBRadio UI and Router Setup
Launch of CBRadio Web and Template Generation Tools
Deployment of Configurable Scheduled Task Engine (cbcron)
Launch of Campaign Brain Blogging Platform (cblogs)
Launch of ComfyUI Generative AI Backend with FastAPI Proxy and CDN Integration

phases.name: Campaign Brain Foundation
phases.description: The Nominate-AI project ecosystem's foundation, focusing on Campaign Brain's infrastructure and supporting services.

milestones.title: Campaign Brain TTS service wrapping VibeVoice-Realtime-0.5B
Campaign Brain data center infrastructure — systemd units, SOPS scripts, health daemon, certbot hooks
Initial CBQA CLI with full DC1 regression results
Multi-tenant Airtable API wrapper with DuckDB sync
Multi-tenant Iterable API wrapper with DuckDB sync
User guides and ops handbooks for Campaign Brain services
Campaign Brain infrastructure monorepo — consolidates infra services as submodules

phases.name: Campaign Brain Infrastructure Development
phases.description: This development phase focused on building the infrastructure and tools necessary to support Campaign Brain, including AI-powered task management and scheduling, campaign brain infrastructure standards, operations dashboards, and an e-signature service.

milestones.title: cbea: Task Management and Scheduling Tool
cb infrasays: Campaign Brain Infrastructure Standards & Updates
CB Ops: Operations Dashboard
cbesig: E-Signature Service

repos.name: cbapp
repos.description: The cbapp repository appears to be a Python-based project that has undergone significant updates and refactoring, including domain migrations, API additions, and feature enhancements. Recent commits have focused on improving the user interface, adding new features such as Typeform integration, and fixing bugs. The repository is now in a state of active development.

repos.name: RCI-Frontend
repos.description: Internal tool for managing political radio advertising rates across 1,900+ radio stations with advanced filtering, QA workflows, and rate management capabilities · Built with Manus

repos.name: cbfiles
repos.description: The cbfiles repository appears to be a Python project that provides various features for image and video processing, including vision inference, search, and media asset management. Recent commits have focused on improving performance, adding new features such as HEIC support, and enhancing compatibility with different platforms. The repository has also undergone domain migrations and refactorings.

repos.name: cbproject
repos.description: cbproject repository with ongoing development and maintenance

repos.name: cbos
repos.description: The cbos repository appears to be a Python project that has undergone significant development and maintenance over several months, with recent commits focusing on improving code quality, adding new features, and updating dependencies. The repository has seen multiple major releases (v0.3.1, v0.4.0, v0.5.0) and several minor updates, indicating a steady pace of development and refinement. Overall, the project seems to be centered around building a mesh-based system with various features and tools.
